MINI MINUTES FOR MAY-11-2015 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION, 302, PLAINTIFF PAMELA PRIDGEN'S MOTION FOR RELIEF FROM THE CLAIMS FILING REQUIREMENTS (GOVT. C. 946.6) IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF'S NEGLECT IS EXCUSABLE BECAUSE SHE MADE MULTIPLE INQUIRIES AS TO THE ACCIDENT AND FILING DEADLINES, AND WAS POSSIBLY GIVEN ERRONEOUS INFORMATION. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; REPORTER: MELANIE GHENO, CSR # 7489 (302/HK)

MINI MINUTES FOR NOV-30-2016 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF PAMELA PRIGDEN'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE THIS CASE WITH CASE CGC-14-543318 IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. THE TWO CASES ARE CONSOLIDATED FOR ALL PURPOSES INCLUDING TRIAL THAT IS SET FOR FEBRUARY 21, 2017. CASE 543318 IS THE LEAD CASE AND ALL FURTHER FILINGS WILL BE IN THAT CASE ONLY. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN. CLERK: ROSIE NOGUERA. REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR #5976. (302/HK)

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Dec-07-2016 Vacated

MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-14-543318 WITH CASE CGC-15-545271
Off Calendar Nov-30-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Steven A. Fabgro fo Law Offices of Steven A. Fabbro telephone number 415-391-6850 for Plaintiff Pamela Pidgen.
Jason Chou of Carpenter, Zuckerman & Rowley, LLP telephone number 310-273-1230 appeared by telephone for Plaintiff Nicholas Cascio.

The Court confirmed its tentative ruling. Plaintiff Pamela Prigden's motion to consolidate this case with case CGC-14-543318 is granted. No opposition filed. The two cases are consolidated for all purposes including trial that is set for February 21, 2017. Case 543318 is the lead case and all further filings will be in that case only. Order signed in open Court.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-18-2016 Continued To Feb-21-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-26-2016 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-06-2016 Continued To Jul-05-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-26-2015 Set For Trial On Mar-28-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Relief From The Claims Filing Requirements (Govt. C. 946.6)
Off Calendar May-11-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. STEVEN A. FABBRO, TEL. NO. 1-415-391-6850 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE;
ATTY. DAVID A. DELBON, DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY, TEL. NO. 1-415-554-3962 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - A R G U E D; The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF PAMELA PRIDGEN'S Motion For Relief From The Claims Filing Requirements (Govt. C. 946.6) is Granted. Plaintiff's neglect is excusable because she made multiple inquiries as to the accident and filing deadlines, and was possibly given erroneous information. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR # 7489
